description: Deep-dive trigger rules that inject additional questions when specific response patterns are detected during the elicitation session.

extreme_formality.description: When the formal/casual semantic differential exceeds 6.0, inject three deep-dive items probing the extremity of formality preference

high_narrative_tendency.description: When narrativity score exceeds 75 (out of 100), inject two deep-dive items exploring narrative voice characteristics

self_perception_divergence.description: When the absolute difference between self-reported and projective scores exceeds 25 points on any dimension, inject a calibration question to resolve the divergence

low_engagement_detector.description: When 3 or more consecutive responses fall below the minimum expected time threshold, inject an engagement reset prompt to re-engage the respondent

notes.injection_priority: If multiple triggers fire simultaneously, process in order: low_engagement_detector > self_perception_divergence > extreme_formality > high_narrative_tendency
